markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on account changes, reporting, and content strategy for the new Leads product.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Account Transition:** Matthew Panzarino is transitioning out of the account manager role, with Katya taking over. The sync cadence will shift from weekly to bi-weekly to reduce meeting overhead.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [**Leads Product Strategy:** The new "Leads" product is a pipeline management tool, not a full CRM. Content will target the Business Development Representative (BDR) persona to ensure relevance and capture high-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [**Civil Engineering Content:** A high-traffic "Civil Engineer Salary Guide" post attracts non-ICP traffic. The plan is to retain the post but refine its strategy to target the private sector, which aligns with Monograph's ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)

## Topics

### Account Transition & Cadence Change

  - [Matthew Panzarino is transitioning out of the account manager role.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
      - [**New AM:** Katya will take over.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
      - [**Continuity:** Matthew will remain in Slack channels to ensure a smooth transition.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [The sync cadence will change from weekly to bi-weekly.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To reduce meeting overhead during periods of consistent performance.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [**Flexibility:** Ad-hoc weekly syncs can be scheduled for new initiatives (e.g., product launches).](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [The November performance report is due December 3rd.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
      - [**Attendees:** Robert (Monograph) will join this meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)

### New "Leads" Product Content Strategy

  - [Monograph shared a spec sheet for the upcoming "Leads" product.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [**Product Definition:** A pipeline management and forecasting tool, not a full CRM.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [**Audience:** The primary user is the Business Development Representative (BDR).](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
      - [**Context:** Pipeline functionality is considered "table stakes" in the market, not a "flashy" feature.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
      - [**Paid/Earned Media:** Pivot messaging to "all-in-one" software, de-emphasizing "CRM."](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
      - [**SEO/Content:** Continue creating CRM-related content to build thought leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
          - [**Positioning:** Frame Monograph's tool as the ideal, right-sized solution for architects.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [**Persona Development:** Growth X will create a BDR persona to guide content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To ensure content speaks directly to the BDR's specific pain points and goals.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [**Process:** Growth X will conduct the research, using its "context engineering" process.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

### Civil Engineering Content Performance

  - [A "Civil Engineer Salary Guide" post is a top traffic driver, but civil engineers are not Monograph's ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
      - [**Context:** The original strategy was to avoid government/military projects, which are common for civil engineers.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [**Performance Discrepancy:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
      - **SEMrush:** Reports "civil engineer" as the \#1 keyword (15% of traffic).
      - [**Looker (GSC data):** Shows the "Structural Engineer Salary Guide" outperforming the civil post in sessions and growth.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [**Decision:** Do not remove the post.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The traffic is free, and there's an opportunity to capture ICP users who may be viewing the content.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [**Refined Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** Add links from the civil post to other engineering guides to encourage self-nurturing.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
      - [**Keyword Targeting:** Focus future civil engineering content on the private sector to attract qualified traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
      - [**Lead Signal:** The "AI in Civil Engineering" post has generated two sales-qualified opportunities ("squoats"), one this month, suggesting some value in the topic.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=2076.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Growth X:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
      - [Introduce Katya as the new account manager.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
      - [Deliver the November performance report on December 3rd.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
      - [Create a BDR persona to guide content for the "Leads" product.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [Grant Jessica and Allison access to the Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [**Monograph:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
      - [Confirm the bi-weekly sync cadence with Robert.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [Review civil engineering content performance (traffic, bounce rate, conversions) and report findings.](https://fathom.video/share/Ka4ZCPxz2Ngd7Jk8yYm17cv6XH_11bht?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
